title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still...

title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Users are reporting 504 errors when attempting to process payments through Stripe.

title: Dashboard Layout Broken
description: The sidebar overlaps the main content on screen sizes below 1024px.

title: Welcome Email Not Sending
description: New users are not receiving the verification email after signing up.

title: Database Connection Leak
description: Server logs showing high connection pool usage; needs immediate investigation.

title: Profile Picture Upload Fail
description: Images larger than 2MB are being rejected without a proper error message.

title: Search Latency Issue
description: Search queries are taking more than 5 seconds to return results from the DB.

title: Subscription Update Failure
description: Users cannot upgrade from Basic to Pro plan; billing cycle error.

title: Broken Link in Footer
description: The 'Privacy Policy' link in the footer leads to a 404 page.

title: PDF Report Generation Error
description: The monthly export feature is crashing when generating data for large accounts.

title: Dark Mode Toggle Bug
description: Switching to dark mode does not change the text color of the data tables.

title: Mobile App Crash on Launch
description: Android users reporting crashes immediately after opening the application.

title: Missing Translation Keys
description: Several buttons in the settings page are showing raw JSON keys instead of labels.

title: API Rate Limit Too Strict
description: Integrations are being blocked prematurely due to incorrect rate limit config.

title: Incorrect Inventory Count
description: Dashboard showing 'Out of Stock' for items that have positive balance in DB.

title: Two-Factor Auth Slow SMS
description: SMS codes are taking up to 10 minutes to arrive for international users.
